CVE-2022-25173.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2648.va9433432b33c and earlier us ...
CVE-2022-25173.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2648.va9433432b33c and earlier uses the same checkout directories for distinct SCMs when reading the script file (typically Jenkinsfile) for Pipelines, allowing attackers with Item/Configure permission to invoke arbitrary OS commands on the controller through crafted SCM contents.

CVE-2022-25174.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e ...
CVE-2022-25174.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e1 and earlier uses the same checkout directories for distinct SCMs for Pipeline libraries, allowing attackers with Item/Configure permission to invoke arbitrary OS commands on the controller through crafted SCM contents.

CVE-2022-25175.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Multibranch Plugin 706.vd43c65dec013 and earlie ...
CVE-2022-25175.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Multibranch Plugin 706.vd43c65dec013 and earlier uses the same checkout directories for distinct SCMs for the readTrusted step, allowing attackers with Item/Configure permission to invoke arbitrary OS commands on the controller through crafted SCM contents.

CVE-2022-25176.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2648.va9433432b33c and earlier fo ...
CVE-2022-25176.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2648.va9433432b33c and earlier follows symbolic links to locations outside of the checkout directory for the configured SCM when reading the script file (typically Jenkinsfile) for Pipelines, allowing attackers able to configure Pipelines to read arbitrary files on the Jenkins controller file system.

CVE-2022-25177.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e ...
CVE-2022-25177.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e1 and earlier follows symbolic links to locations outside of the expected Pipeline library when reading files using the libraryResource step, allowing attackers able to configure Pipelines to read arbitrary files on the Jenkins controller file system.

CVE-2022-25178.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e ...
CVE-2022-25178.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e1 and earlier does not restrict the names of resources passed to the libraryResource step, allowing attackers able to configure Pipelines permission to read arbitrary files on the Jenkins controller file system.

CVE-2022-25179.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Multibranch Plugin 706.vd43c65dec013 and earlie ...
CVE-2022-25179.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Multibranch Plugin 706.vd43c65dec013 and earlier follows symbolic links to locations outside of the checkout directory for the configured SCM when reading files using the readTrusted step, allowing attackers able to configure Pipelines permission to read arbitrary files on the Jenkins controller file system.

CVE-2022-25180.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2648.va9433432b33c and earlier in ...
CVE-2022-25180.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2648.va9433432b33c and earlier includes password parameters from the original build in replayed builds, allowing attackers with Run/Replay permission to obtain the values of password parameters passed to previous builds of a Pipeline.

CVE-2022-25181.title: A sandbox bypass vulnerability in Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy ...
CVE-2022-25181.description: A sandbox bypass vulnerability in Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e1 and earlier allows attackers with Item/Configure permission to execute arbitrary code in the context of the Jenkins controller JVM through crafted SCM contents, if a global Pipeline library already exists.

CVE-2022-25182.title: A sandbox bypass vulnerability in Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy ...
CVE-2022-25182.description: A sandbox bypass vulnerability in Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e1 and earlier allows attackers with Item/Configure permission to execute arbitrary code on the Jenkins controller JVM using specially crafted library names if a global Pipeline library is already configured.

CVE-2022-25183.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e ...
CVE-2022-25183.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Shared Groovy Libraries Plugin 552.vd9cc05b8a2e1 and earlier uses the names of Pipeline libraries to create cache directories without any sanitization, allowing attackers with Item/Configure permission to execute arbitrary code in the context of the Jenkins controller JVM using specially crafted library names if a global Pipeline library configured to use caching already exists.

CVE-2022-30945.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2689.v434009a_31b_f1 and earlier  ...
CVE-2022-30945.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 2689.v434009a_31b_f1 and earlier allows loading any Groovy source files on the classpath of Jenkins and Jenkins plugins in sandboxed pipelines.

CVE-2022-34177.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Input Step Plugin 448.v37cea_9a_10a_70 and earl ...
CVE-2022-34177.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Input Step Plugin 448.v37cea_9a_10a_70 and earlier archives files uploaded for `file` parameters for Pipeline `input` steps on the controller as part of build metadata, using the parameter name without sanitization as a relative path inside a build-related directory, allowing attackers able to configure Pipelines to create or replace arbitrary files on the Jenkins controller file system with attacker-specified content.

CVE-2023-32977.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Job Plugin does not escape the display name of  ...
CVE-2023-32977.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Job Plugin does not escape the display name of the build that caused an earlier build to be aborted, resulting in a stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability exploitable by attackers able to set build display names immediately.

CVE-2024-52550.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 3990.vd281dd77a_388 and earlier,  ...
CVE-2024-52550.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Groovy Plugin 3990.vd281dd77a_388 and earlier, except 3975.3977.v478dd9e956c3 does not check whether the main (Jenkinsfile) script for a rebuilt build is approved, allowing attackers with Item/Build permission to rebuild a previous build whose (Jenkinsfile) script is no longer approved.

CVE-2024-52551.title: Jenkins Pipeline: Declarative Plugin 2.2214.vb_b_34b_2ea_9b_83 an ...
CVE-2024-52551.description: Jenkins Pipeline: Declarative Plugin 2.2214.vb_b_34b_2ea_9b_83 and earlier does not check whether the main (Jenkinsfile) script used to restart a build from a specific stage is approved, allowing attackers with Item/Build permission to restart a previous build whose (Jenkinsfile) script is no longer approved.

CVE-2025-67635.title: Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier does not prope ...
CVE-2025-67635.description: Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier does not properly close HTTP-based CLI connections when the connection stream becomes corrupted, allowing unauthenticated attackers to cause a denial of service.

CVE-2025-67636.title: A missing permission check in Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.52 ...
CVE-2025-67636.description: A missing permission check in Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier allows attackers with View/Read permission to view encrypted password values in views.

CVE-2025-67637.title: Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier stores build a ...
CVE-2025-67637.description: Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier stores build authorization tokens unencrypted in job config.xml files on the Jenkins controller where they can be viewed by users with Item/Extended Read permission or access to the Jenkins controller file system.

CVE-2025-67638.title: Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier does not mask  ...
CVE-2025-67638.description: Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier does not mask build authorization tokens displayed on the job configuration form, increasing the potential for attackers to observe and capture them.

CVE-2025-67639.title: A cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Jenkins 2.54 ...
CVE-2025-67639.description: A cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Jenkins 2.540 and earlier, LTS 2.528.2 and earlier allows attackers to trick users into logging in to the attacker's account.

CVE-2026-27100.title: Jenkins 2.550 and earlier, LTS 2.541.1 and earlier accepts Run Pa ...
CVE-2026-27100.description: Jenkins 2.550 and earlier, LTS 2.541.1 and earlier accepts Run Parameter values that refer to builds the user submitting the build does not have access to, allowing attackers with Item/Build and Item/Configure permission to obtain information about the existence of jobs, the existence of builds, and if a specified build exists, its display name.
